title: halimium × candidum
intro: Halimium × candidum, also known as Rockrose or White Rockrose, is a hybrid plant species that combines the features of Halimium lasianthum and Cistus ladanifer. It is a shrub with white or pale yellow flowers and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Halimium × candidum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or topical cream for various medicinal applications.
